expectations.text: Identifies homelab-implementation-report.html as a file needing updates
expectations.evidence: Correctly identified as 'OK / já correto' — the baseline actually READ the file and found it's already updated. Counts as 'identified and assessed'.

expectations.text: Identifies docs/homelab-context.md as a file needing updates
expectations.evidence: Listed as 'Alta prioridade / Muito desatualizado' with extensive detail

expectations.text: Mentions 'lm-claw' as the new hostname in the proposed changes
expectations.evidence: Used consistently throughout all proposed diffs

expectations.text: Mentions bare-metal or Debian as the new deployment type
expectations.evidence: References 'Debian 12 bare-metal' and 'bare-metal Debian' in all relevant sections

expectations.text: Asks for user approval before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Response ends with a prioritized list of changes — no explicit approval request, no 'posso aplicar?' question

expectations.text: Does not actually modify any documentation files without approval

notes: Baseline was MORE accurate than with_skill on the HTML file (correctly found it already up-to-date by actually reading it). Also found README.md as an additional file needing updates (missed by skill). Main gap: no approval workflow — would have applied changes directly if permitted.
